subject: LU-12506 mdc: clean up code style for mdc_locks.c

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Cannot build patch due to 14, messages:

  /home/green/git/lustre-release/lustre/mdc/mdc_locks.c: In function ‘mdc_finish_intent_lock’:
 /home/green/git/lustre-release/lustre/mdc/mdc_locks.c:1135:3: error: expected expression before ‘else’
    else if (it->it_op == IT_OPEN)
    ^
 /home/green/git/lustre-release/lustre/mdc/mdc_locks.c: At top level:
 cc1: error: unrecognized command line option "-Wno-stringop-overflow" [-Werror]
 cc1: error: unrecognized command line option "-Wno-stringop-truncation" [-Werror]
 cc1: error: unrecognized command line option "-Wno-format-truncation" [-Werror]

Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1

Charlie, it would be useful to update the "Test Parameters" wiki page with the limits for mdscount (or mdscount+osscount) that can be run without intervention, and how many by special request (as seems to be the case here since it looks like the test was held until you released it).

It seems that 10 MDTs/MDS (14MDS) is the safe limit for our current VM config.  With 11 MDTs/MDS (12MDS) one of them OOM at startup, and with 4 MDTs/MDS (32MDS) there were problems with SSH/mcmd connecting to the VMs.

However, it looks like there are some issues in test-framework when there are more than 10 MDTs specified that need to be fixed before this will actually test properly.

commit.subject: LU-12506 mdc: clean up code style for mdc_locks.c
commit.message:
LU-12506 mdc: clean up code style for mdc_locks.c

Clean up code style in mdc_locks.c (whitespace, strings)

Run a useful test while we are at it.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=runtests mdscount=10 mdtcount=80
